summary: Tested Anniversary-Based Proration Logic for Razorpay subscription upgrades. All 48 tests passed (20 new anniversary proration tests + 28 existing subscription tests). The new feature correctly preserves the original anniversary date when users upgrade their plan.
critical_code_review_comments: The calculate_anniversary_proration function correctly calculates prorated charges preserving the original anniversary date
The process_immediate_upgrade function properly creates one-time Razorpay orders for proration and schedules subscriptions with start_at
The upgrade-preview endpoint returns comprehensive proration details including anniversary_date, new_period_start, new_period_end
The confirm-proration-payment endpoint correctly verifies payment status before confirming upgrade
The cancel-pending-upgrade endpoint properly cancels scheduled subscriptions in Razorpay and cleans up user data
The subscription status endpoint correctly returns pending_change info for scheduled upgrades
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin user and subscription plans
context_for_next_testing_agent: Anniversary-Based Proration Logic fully tested. New endpoints: POST /api/subscriptions/upgrade-preview (returns proration calculation with anniversary_date preserved), POST /api/subscriptions/confirm-proration-payment (confirms pending upgrade after payment), POST /api/subscriptions/cancel-pending-upgrade (cancels scheduled anniversary upgrade). The change-plan endpoint now creates one-time prorated orders and schedules subscriptions for anniversary date. Note: Full upgrade flow testing requires a user with an active subscription - admin user doesn't have one so some tests were skipped.

POST /api/subscriptions/upgrade-preview.details: Returns proration calculation with anniversary_date, new_period_start, new_period_end. Requires active subscription.

POST /api/subscriptions/confirm-proratio.details: Confirms pending upgrade after payment verification. Returns 400 if no pending upgrade.

POST /api/subscriptions/cancel-pending-u.details: Cancels scheduled anniversary upgrade and cleans up user data. Returns 400 if no pending upgrade.

GET /api/subscriptions/status.details: Returns pending_change field for scheduled upgrades (null if no pending change)

POST /api/subscriptions/change-plan.details: Now creates one-time prorated order and schedules subscription for anniversary date

calculate_anniversary_proration function.details: Correctly calculates prorated charge preserving anniversary date. Formula: prorated_charge = (days_remaining/days_in_period) * new_price - (days_remaining/days_in_period) * current_price

example_1.scenario: Basic Monthly (₹499) to Pro Monthly (₹699), 20 days remaining in 30-day period
